channel.title: LLM Timeline — Anthropic Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Anthropic.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Sonnet 4.6 License: open Type: model 1M context. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6 Showing GMMLU (Global MMLU by Cohere).

item.title: Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Opus 4.6 License: open Type: model

item.title: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Opus 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Opus 4.5 License: open Type: model "the best model in the world for coding, agents, and computer use." Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5

item.title: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Sonnet 4.5 License: open Type: model The Claude Sonnet 4.5 "system card" is an absolute farce. Announce: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-5

item.title: Claude Opus 4.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Opus 4.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Opus 4.1 License: open Type: model

item.title: Claude Gov (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Opus 4 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude Opus 4 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude Opus 4 License: open Type: model "Claude Opus 4 is our most intelligent model to date, pushing the frontier in coding, agentic search, and creative writing. With advanced reasoning and powerful collaboration capabilities…Both models can also alternate between reasoning and tool use—like web search—to improve responses…Claude Opus 4 can work continuously for hours on complex, long-running tasks"

item.title: Claude 3.7 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3.7 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 3.7 Sonnet License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff now November 2024 (was April 2024). "the first hybrid reasoning model on the market." https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-3-7-sonnet

item.title: Claude 3.5 Haiku (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (new) (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (new) License: open Type: model Absurd naming scheme. Paper addendum pp51-64: https://assets.anthropic.com/m/61e7d27f8c8f5919/original/Claude-3-Model-Card.pdf#page=51

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 3.5 Sonnet License: closed Type: model MMLU=90.4 with prompting. Model card: https://www-cdn.anthropic.com/fed9cc193a14b84131812372d8d5857f8f304c52/Model_Card_Claude_3_Addendum.pdf

item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3 Sonnet (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3 Opus (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 3 Opus (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 3 Opus License: open Type: model Original MMLU=86.8 (GPT-4=86.4). MMLU=88.2 with CoT prompting. Original GPQA=50.4. 200k context, 1M for researchers.

item.title: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 2.1 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 2.1 License: open Type: model Less hallucinations, 200k context length, tool use

item.title: Claude Instant (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 2 (Anthropic)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Anthropic

item.title: Claude 2 (Anthropic)
item.description: Parameters: Claude 2 License: open Type: model More HHH, 200k context length
